theorem P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (A : Set X) → Topology.P3 A := by
  intro hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P2] at hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P3]
  intro x hxA
  have hx_int : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := hP2 hxA
  have hsubset : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) := by
    have hclsubset : closure (interior A) ⊆ closure A := by
      have : interior A ⊆ (A : Set X) := interior_subset
      exact closure_mono this
    exact interior_mono hclsubset
  exact hsubset hx_int
